JUDGE:VON BEROLDINGEN;CLERK:WILLIAMS;REPORTER:GALLAGHER 9:25AM: CASE CALLED FOR PROVE-UP COURT TRIAL. NO APPEARANCE OF DEFENDANT. MARK WILSON SWORN AND EXAMINED.
